items.title: Meghan to appear as guest judge on MasterChef Australia
items.dek: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex are on a four-day visit to Australia - their first since 2018.
items.body: The Duke and Duchess of Sussex are on a four-day visit to Australia - their first since 2018.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: More than 200 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack return home
items.dek: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.
items.body: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those repatriated.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Kenya fuel prices rise sharply despite reduction in tax due to Iran war
items.dek: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
items.body: Diesel prices rise by a record margin despite a reduction in value added tax.
